title: Embed Live365 iframe player in OnAirNow component

requirements.text: Embed the Live365 iframe player (`<iframe width="450" height="316" frameborder="0" src="https://live365.com/embeds/v1/player/a57949?s=md&m=dark&c=mp3"></iframe>`) inside the `OnAirNow` component (`frontend/src/components/OnAirNow.tsx`), positioned prominently within the section. The iframe must be responsive — wrap it in a container that caps its max width and centers it horizontally so it fits well on both mobile and desktop layouts while preserving the existing country theme styling around it.

quotes: add <iframe width="450" height="316" frameborder="0" src="https://live365.com/embeds/v1/player/a57949?s=md&m=dark&c=mp3"></iframe> to now playing section

acceptanceCriteria: The Live365 iframe player appears inside the OnAirNow component (`frontend/src/components/OnAirNow.tsx`)
The iframe src is exactly `https://live365.com/embeds/v1/player/a57949?s=md&m=dark&c=mp3` with width=450, height=316, frameborder=0
The iframe is wrapped in a responsive container with a capped max-width and centered horizontally
The player renders correctly on both mobile and desktop viewports without horizontal overflow
Existing country theme styling (warm earthy tones, serif typography, ON AIR badge, show info) is preserved around the player

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Preserve all existing OnAirNow component styling and functionality
Use the exact iframe attributes provided by the user: width=450, height=316, frameborder=0, src=https://live365.com/embeds/v1/player/a57949?s=md&m=dark&c=mp3
nonGoals: Changes to any other component or page
Replacing or removing the existing show/DJ info display in OnAirNow
